packages.name: @tacogips/google-speech-to-text-addon
packages.description: Transcribe local audio with Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v1 long-running recognition.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
requiredEnvironment.description: OAuth access token for Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and Cloud Storage. Provide one of GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON; gcloud is used as a fallback token source when none is set.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
requiredEnvironment.description: Path to a Google service account credential JSON file able to upload to the target Cloud Storage bucket and run Speech-to-Text recognition. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON
requiredEnvironment.description: Inline Google service account credential JSON. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

capabilities.name: process.spawn
capabilities.reason: runs curl and node to upload audio, start long-running recognition, and poll the operation

capabilities.name: network.egress
capabilities.reason: uploads audio to Cloud Storage and calls speech.googleapis.com

capabilities.name: filesystem.read
capabilities.reason: reads the audio file submitted to Google Speech-to-Text

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes transcripts, captions, raw response, and output JSON

capabilities.name: env.read
capabilities.reason: reads explicit Google authentication environment bindings

packages.name: @tacogips/mp4-audio-extract-addon
packages.description: Extract FLAC audio from an MP4 file using ffmpeg.

capabilities.name: process.spawn
capabilities.reason: runs ffmpeg to extract audio from MP4

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes the extracted audio artifact and output JSON

packages.name: @tacogips/pdf-to-images-addon
packages.description: Render PDF pages to PNG or JPEG image artifacts inside a Python PyMuPDF container for visual analysis workflows.

capabilities.name: container.build
capabilities.reason: builds the packaged Python PyMuPDF image from Containerfile

capabilities.name: container.run
capabilities.reason: runs Python and PyMuPDF inside the container to render PDF pages

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes rendered page image artifacts and output JSON

packages.name: @tacogips/youtube-mp4-download-addon
packages.description: Download a YouTube URL to an MP4 file using yt-dlp.

capabilities.name: process.spawn
capabilities.reason: runs yt-dlp to download and mux video

capabilities.name: network.egress
capabilities.reason: yt-dlp downloads media from the requested URL

capabilities.name: filesystem.write
capabilities.reason: writes the downloaded MP4 artifact and output JSON

packages.name: @tacogips/youtube-mp4-to-text-workflow
packages.description: Example workflow that downloads YouTube MP4, extracts audio, and transcribes it with Google Speech-to-Text.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
requiredEnvironment.description: OAuth access token for Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and Cloud Storage. Provide one of GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON; gcloud is used as a fallback token source when none is set.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
requiredEnvironment.description: Path to a Google service account credential JSON file able to upload to the target Cloud Storage bucket and run Speech-to-Text recognition. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON
requiredEnvironment.description: Inline Google service account credential JSON. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

packages.name: @tacogips/youtube-shorts-to-text-container
packages.description: Download a YouTube Shorts URL and transcribe its audio through a Docker-contained worker.

workflow.description: Download a YouTube Shorts URL to MP4, extract FLAC audio, upload it to Google Cloud Storage, and transcribe it with Google Speech-to-Text.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
requiredEnvironment.description: OAuth access token for Google Cloud Speech-to-Text and Cloud Storage. Provide one of GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN, GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON; gcloud is used as a fallback token source when none is set.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS
requiredEnvironment.description: Path to a Google service account credential JSON file able to upload to the target Cloud Storage bucket and run Speech-to-Text recognition. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON.

requiredEnvironment.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON
requiredEnvironment.description: Inline Google service account credential JSON. Alternative to GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.

packages.name: claude-code-adversarial-implementation-review-loop
packages.title: claude-code-adversarial-implementation-review-loop
packages.description: Run a scoped Claude Code implementation request, adversarially review the implemented result, delegate blocking fixes, and repeat until no high or medium findings remain.

workflow.title: claude-code-adversarial-implementation-review-loop
workflow.description: Run a scoped Claude Code implementation request, adversarially review the implemented result, delegate blocking fixes, and repeat until no high or medium findings remain.

packages.name: claude-code-deepdesign
packages.title: claude-code-deepdesign
packages.description: Create and iteratively review design-doc specifications with one Claude Code author, one deep edge-case reviewer, and one broad integration reviewer until no high or middle findings remain.

workflow.title: claude-code-deepdesign
workflow.description: Create and iteratively review design-doc specifications with one Claude Code author, one deep edge-case reviewer, and one broad integration reviewer until no high or middle findings remain.

packages.name: claude-code-design-and-implement-review-loop
packages.title: claude-code-design-and-implement-review-loop
packages.description: Shared Claude Code workflow for issue resolution or planning-only design and implementation-plan handoff. The workflow owns both the sequential path and the bounded feature-local fanout path, then joins accepted plans before implementation or planning-only completion.

workflow.title: claude-code-design-and-implement-review-loop
workflow.description: Shared Claude Code workflow for issue resolution or planning-only design and implementation-plan handoff. The workflow owns both the sequential path and the bounded feature-local fanout path, then joins accepted plans before implementation or planning-only completion.

packages.name: claude-code-goal
packages.title: claude-code-goal
packages.description: Generic Claude Code Opus 4.8 workflow that actively investigates available Riela workflows at each step, defines and reviews a goal, creates and reviews an in-session plan without writing plan files, performs the work, may delegate to a more specific workflow when appropriate, and reviews goal completion before looping back to work or planning.

workflow.title: claude-code-goal
workflow.description: Generic Claude Code Opus 4.8 workflow that actively investigates available Riela workflows at each step, defines and reviews a goal, creates and reviews an in-session plan without writing plan files, performs the work, may delegate to a more specific workflow when appropriate, and reviews goal completion before looping back to work or planning.

packages.name: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-loop
packages.title: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-loop
packages.description: Find incomplete implementation plans under impl-plans/active, delegate each selected plan to claude-code-adversarial-implementation-review-loop, and repeat sequentially until no incomplete active plans remain.

workflow.title: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-loop
workflow.description: Find incomplete implementation plans under impl-plans/active, delegate each selected plan to claude-code-adversarial-implementation-review-loop, and repeat sequentially until no incomplete active plans remain.

packages.name: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-review-loop
packages.title: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-review-loop
packages.description: Run the Claude Code implementation-plan completion loop, then run the recent-change quality review-and-improve loop against the resulting work.

workflow.title: claude-code-impl-plan-completion-review-loop
workflow.description: Run the Claude Code implementation-plan completion loop, then run the recent-change quality review-and-improve loop against the resulting work.

packages.name: claude-code-recent-change-quality-loop
packages.title: claude-code-recent-change-quality-loop
packages.description: Review code changes introduced within a configurable recent time window, including uncommitted changes, and delegate any blocking findings into the design-and-implement workflow before re-reviewing until no high or mid findings remain.

workflow.title: claude-code-recent-change-quality-loop
workflow.description: Review code changes introduced within a configurable recent time window, including uncommitted changes, and delegate any blocking findings into the design-and-implement workflow before re-reviewing until no high or mid findings remain.

packages.name: claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer
packages.title: claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer
packages.description: Divide the codebase into package or related processing-group slices, review slices concurrently, merge findings into a refactoring plan, implement one bounded task at a time, self-review, independently post-review, and loop until the plan is complete or only accepted residual risks remain. Duplicate-scavenge is an additive mode of this same workflow; detailed phase behavior lives in the step prompts.

workflow.title: claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer
workflow.description: Divide the codebase into package or related processing-group slices, review slices concurrently, merge findings into a refactoring plan, implement one bounded task at a time, self-review, independently post-review, and loop until the plan is complete or only accepted residual risks remain. Duplicate-scavenge is an additive mode of this same workflow; detailed phase behavior lives in the step prompts.

packages.name: claude-code-refactoring-slice-review
packages.title: claude-code-refactoring-slice-review
packages.description: Read-only review workflow for one codebase slice produced by claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer fanout, including duplicate-scavenge review when the parent workflow requests duplicate implementations or parallel custom implementations of the same concept.

workflow.title: claude-code-refactoring-slice-review
workflow.description: Read-only review workflow for one codebase slice produced by claude-code-refactoring-divide-and-conquer fanout, including duplicate-scavenge review when the parent workflow requests duplicate implementations or parallel custom implementations of the same concept.

packages.name: claude-code-simple-work-package
packages.title: claude-code-simple-work-package
packages.description: Lightweight Claude Code workflow for small code or documentation changes when no dedicated workflow applies. It implements with Claude Code Sonnet 4.5 high effort, reviews the diff, and loops back only for high or middle findings.

workflow.title: claude-code-simple-work-package
workflow.description: Lightweight Claude Code workflow for small code or documentation changes when no dedicated workflow applies. It implements with Claude Code Sonnet 4.5 high effort, reviews the diff, and loops back only for high or middle findings.

packages.name: claude-code-source-security-check-loop
packages.title: claude-code-source-security-check-loop
packages.description: Run deterministic source-code security checks, derive harness-style focus areas, triage and adversarially verify findings with Claude Code, delegate blocking fixes, and rescan until verified high and medium findings are resolved.

workflow.title: claude-code-source-security-check-loop
workflow.description: Run deterministic source-code security checks, derive harness-style focus areas, triage and adversarially verify findings with Claude Code, delegate blocking fixes, and rescan until verified high and medium findings are resolved.

packages.name: claude-code-task-watchdog
packages.title: claude-code-task-watchdog
packages.description: Long-running Claude Code task watcher backed by ./tasks/list.jsonl, with cron/event polling, dependency workflow dispatch, ad hoc Claude Code execution, post-task skill mining, skill review, and commit.

workflow.title: claude-code-task-watchdog
workflow.description: Long-running Claude Code task watcher backed by ./tasks/list.jsonl, with cron/event polling, dependency workflow dispatch, ad hoc Claude Code execution, post-task skill mining, skill review, and commit.

packages.name: claude-code-website-builder
packages.title: claude-code-website-builder
packages.description: Event-ready Claude Code workflow that designs, assets, implements, runs Bun inside Docker, reviews, iterates, and snapshots SolidJS websites.

workflow.title: claude-code-website-builder
workflow.description: Event-ready Claude Code workflow that designs, assets, implements, runs Bun inside Docker, reviews, iterates, and snapshots SolidJS websites.
